storyInfo: During the evacuation, some of the miners give up their chance to board the vehicles and go in the opposite direction with torches raised, hoping to draw the Army's fire. As more and more die, Amiya raises her sword and creates a wall of fire on the ice, which stops the Army's shelling.

attributes.content: 'Dispatch speaking.'
'Target acquired. They're moving toward Lake Neva.'
'Cease fire and surround the target coordinates.'
'Coordinates sent to your terminals.'
Are you out of the woods, Raidian?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Scout team here. We're at the rendezvous point.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: The first batch of vehicles are here. We'll need to wait for the second batch to arrive.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Sorry, I didn't expect things to get so urgent.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Have you tracked more of the Armies' movements, Raidian?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Not yet... the military channel went dark after our broadcast. They're on guard now, and we're unable to get more information.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: It's so quiet, it's making me uneasy...
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Stay hidden, Amiya.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: We'll be careful.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Stay in touch. How's Mantra?
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Still exhausted. Vetochki and the others have made a stretcher for her—
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Amiya.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Mantra! You shouldn't be 'talking'!
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: I'm awake. Tell Elysium that I can walk on my own.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: No, not yet.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: See? I told you so!
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: Remember how Blaze was bedridden for two weeks after getting injured on a mission? We didn't let her feet touch the ground for a single second.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: So don't even think about it, dear Mantra.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: ...The situation is different.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Okay, here's a compromise. Once you're through the woods, you can choose me or Elysium to be your crutch.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Is G-Grypherburg, on the other side, of the frozen lake?
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: I heard, the Infected, can't enter n-nomadic cities.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: I never went to the cities before I got infected. I lived all my life in the villages, until a Catastrophe infected most of us.
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: But they said we didn't need to walk, right? There'll be vehicles, like the ones we found.
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: I think Nikto was from Grypherburg. Too bad he isn't here.
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: Say, what do you think Nikto and Rankin are doing, Vetochki? Could they have already made it to that village they were talking about?
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: M-Maybe.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: I hope so.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Everyone, take cover, now!
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: An explosion—from the forest? Is the Army here?
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: I just sensed it... Another army's attacking from the east.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: They know where we are. They're trying to force us in the direction of Lake Neva.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: They're out of their minds! We're already in the Central Governorate. The Armies must know what that means!
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: 'Deity Grypherburg is under threat... the Army... will eliminate the enemy.'
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: It's a public broadcast. They're telling Grypherburg that they're putting down a rebellion!
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: I see... this was their plan all along...
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: All this killing and herding... they're planning to reach the capital under the pretext of putting down a rebellion, and negotiate with the State Council by pointing their guns at the gates of Deity Grypherburg!
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: This was what they're trying to achieve... by sacrificing hundreds of thousands in the Far North.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Can you hear me, Amiya?
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: There are Army units to your east—
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: ...The magnetic storms are interfering with comms. I can't get a good signal at this range.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: The rest of the group will arrive soon. Eloysius, I need you here to get them on the vehicles and evacuate in an orderly manner.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: What about you?
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: I must go back and point the way for them.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: You're leaving me here with these vehicles? Aren't you worried that I would abandon you and flee to Grypherburg?
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: If that's your decision, I would appreciate a heads-up.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Rhodes Island will find a way.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: You...
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Hah... is this 'Rhodes Island' full of people like you?
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: No. They're much braver than I.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Your command, Sergeant.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: What the hell is that thing behind us? It appeared out of nowhere—
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: (Stumbles)
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Look out!
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: The Army is shelling indiscriminately. Should we find another path?
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: Can you reach Raidian, Elysium? The scout team might be in even more danger than we are!
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Amiya! Where are you?
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: We're still in the forest on the eastern shores of Lake Neva! We're being fired upon by the Army—
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: They have reinforcements coming from the east. We must get through the lake as quickly as possible! Grypherburg is on the other side.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: The Armies cannot set foot on the western shore of Lake Neva without permission. That's our only chance.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: We need to clear Lake Neva before the Armies complete their encirclement—
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Raidian? Raidian?!
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Magnetic storm—communications—
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: —southwest—ice—
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: No lights, everyone. We'll have to cross the lake in darkness.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Go southwest... I'll point the way.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: I understand. The stars, show the way—
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Cannon shells fall like thunder, exploding in the middle of the crowd. The shockwave and shrapnel split the procession in two.
Dyadya Volya!
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: A crack appears in the ice, and some people have fallen into it.
Aaagh!!
attributes.name: Panicked Miner

attributes.content: The ice is still cracking—we can't get through!
attributes.name: Panicked Miner

attributes.content: Go back! Now! Don't come this way!
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: They're getting closer!
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: Can you reach Raidian?!
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: We got separated. We have some straggling miners we need to pick up, to the northwest of where the shells fell—
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Roger.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: On my way.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Argh—ugh...
attributes.name: Dazed Miner

attributes.content: Darya, your leg, it's bleeding... I'll wrap it up!
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: I'll help—
attributes.name: Medic Operator

attributes.content: ...No, Vetochki. Leave me here.
attributes.name: Dazed Miner

attributes.content: I have flint and kindling. Give me a torch and go. I'll buy you what time I can.
attributes.name: Dazed Miner

attributes.content: I'll carry you, Darya!
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Don't... don't give up.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Yes, don't give up! The bleeding will stop soon. You can get further treatment once we're on the vehicles—
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: But those bastards won't wait! They're herding us like wild manglers. Don't you see?
attributes.name: Dazed Miner

attributes.content: If they just wanted to kill us, they could have burned every inch that we passed through, blown every building up.
attributes.name: Dazed Miner

attributes.content: Do you think they couldn't do it?
attributes.name: Dazed Miner

attributes.content: That's no reason to give up...
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: You don't understand. I was a hunter before they threw me into the mines. I know what some of the cityfolk like to do on hunting trips.
attributes.name: Dazed Miner

attributes.content: They corral their game in one place, kill a couple, and watch the rest struggle.
attributes.name: Dazed Miner

attributes.content: Honestly, I don't know how much time I can buy, but I have to try.
attributes.name: Dazed Miner

attributes.content: It's just a hole in my leg. I'll crawl if I can't walk. I can get a few dozen meters to the east.
attributes.name: Dazed Miner

attributes.content: Stop wasting time. Leave the torch and go.
attributes.name: Dazed Miner

attributes.content: Go!
attributes.name: Dazed Miner

attributes.content: One by one, one by one! We'll be here for fifteen minutes, there's no need to—
attributes.name: Anxious Operator

attributes.content: —push...
attributes.name: Anxious Operator

attributes.content: The operator falls quiet. No one is pushing, no one is squeezing.
They just keep walking forward silently.
...I've never seen an evacuation so orderly.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Not even the famously disciplined First Army could do this.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: That's a good thing, right?
attributes.name: Anxious Operator

attributes.content: It's not normal, is it? It's as though they don't have survival instincts.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Alright. Maybe I'm overthinking it.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: And you, aren't you worried about your captain in the rear?
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Our captain is the most experienced of us by far.
attributes.name: Anxious Operator

attributes.content: The operator stands on tiptoes, trying to see past the end of the procession that is indistinguishable from the pitch-black ice, looking for her captain.
All she sees is the bright red in the distance.
Did they really stop there...?
attributes.name: Anxious Operator

attributes.content: The enemy is shelling the ice!
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: I couldn't reach the driver. Someone needs to tell her to keep the vehicle running and be ready to roll at a moment's notice.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Do you read me?!
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: R-Roger!
attributes.name: Anxious Operator

attributes.content: You should get on, Eloysius. I'll take care of things here—
attributes.name: Anxious Operator

attributes.content: No, you go first and talk to the driver. For your captain.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: I—
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: I'm staying here.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: It was a torch that distracted the Army.
It began with a single torch that someone at the end of the procession raised.
No one heard if he said anything. No one asked why he did it. He simply stopped, lit his torch, and began to walk in the opposite direction.
Who lit the torch? I thought they said no lights—
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: It's Kian.
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: Kian? The one who made flint for everyone? I saw he gave some firewood to Darya just now.
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: It's him. He's walking back. But that's where all the soldiers are! Is he trying to get himself killed?
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: He's doing the same thing that Darya is doing.
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: But we're so close to safety—
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: I have a flint too, and some firewood.
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: What are you doing?
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: They're shelling the ice. They won't let us go. If we don't do something...
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: We all die.
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: But I want to live! I want to go to Grypherburg!
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: We would have died in the mines, remember? Like all other Infected in Ursus.
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: But if we can help the folks on the front lines survive, and the young ones who came to our aid...
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: People will remember what happened here long after we old-timers are gone.
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: One torch passes its flame to another.
One miner forsakes his life, then a second, and a third...
One by one, the miners who have not yet boarded the vehicles raise their torches and walk in the opposite direction.
Towards Kian, towards Darya, towards the trail of footsteps that led here, and towards the impending threat.
Th-They can't... bury us.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Not anymore.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: You're right. They can't bury us quietly anymore, not in the snow, in the mines, or in the lakes!
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: We'll take the torch from our brothers and sisters, and we'll light the way...
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: We'll make sure that all of Ursus sees—
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: And knows that we once lived.
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: The miners who chose to stay behind raise their torches high in the cold night.
They form a bright belt of fire on the ice, one that the gunners cannot miss.
'Ursus will not bury this night the way it has buried many others,' they firmly believe.
The red eyes gaze upon the firelight.
The guns continue to fire, and the ice continues to crack, sending more miners into the gaping crevasses.
They shout and keep their torches high to the very end, with only a slight trembling in their voices.
Of course they are afraid. Of course they are fearful.
But they keep their torches raised, trading their lives for the lives of those behind them.
The Rhodes Island personnel try to stop them, but no one listens.
They're still firing, Amiya! Eloysius's vehicles are full, and the next batch hasn't arrived yet—
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: Amiya!
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: Why... why are they doing this?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: We have to stop them. We can't let—
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: I can't stop this many in my current state.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: But there must be something we can do.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Mantra...
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: I can feel it. I can feel their...
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Their... anger.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: It's so powerful. It's like it's burning them to ashes.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: No...
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: I won't let them.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: This—
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: This slaughter has to stop!
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Anger. The same anger.
An emotion that Amiya has always fought to suppress, one that she would never allow to run unchecked.
Anger lights up her eyes, ignites her heart, and flows to her fingertips.

attributes.text: 'Even if I don't take revenge, even if I never hold a grudge, I still have the right to rage on forever!'

attributes.content: The cerulean and black sword of wrath once again appears in her hand.
Ying Xiao—
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: A clean swing. Blue fire bursts from the tip of the sword, the highly concentrated energy drawing a wall of fire on the ice in the blink of an eye—another long and clear boundary.
On one side, the cracking ice and the shells repelled by the wall of fire.
On the other, the little Cautus and the torch-bearing Infected.
You...
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Amiya points her sword at the shore, at the Army that has herded and slaughtered people like livestock.
Blue fire rages at her sword-tip, a warning to the murderers, be it the guns, the soldiers, or the battleships. Until the flames cease, until the score is settled—
None shall pass.
'Sir, high-powered Originium signal, twelve o'clock, source unknown!'
'Slow down and observe.'
'Yes, sir.'
...Did they cease fire?
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: No, they just slowed down.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: You've stopped some of their attacks, Amiya. Rendezvous ASAP.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: The other vehicles will arrive soon! Let's get out of here!
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: I'm staying until everyone is out.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Wait... something's coming!
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: A vehicle's coming toward us at high speed from the west, but it's not one of ours—I think it's a truck!
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: They drove onto the ice!
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: On alert—
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Raidian! Finally got this thing to work. It's us! Me, Doctor, Ksenia—
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Amiya!
attributes.name: Mon3tr

attributes.content: Doctor! Mon3tr! How did you—
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: And, Operator Crownslayer...?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Didn't have time to chat along the way. I have a lot of questions myself.
attributes.name: Crownslayer

attributes.content: But get on first.
attributes.name: Crownslayer

attributes.options: We owe the Truckers' Union one.;I'll tell you about it later.

attributes.content: Won't disappoint you.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: We'll catch up later. For now, we need to get out of here.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.options: Yes. Operator Mon3tr, Operator Crownslayer...;And {@nickname}, reporting in.

attributes.content: After scanning the survivors on the ice, the lights of the outpost on the southwest shore of Lake Neva point to the Army on the opposite shore.
White light faces off against red light, and the shelling grows even sparser.
'All units, this is Dispatch.'
'All units, cease fire immediately. We have an urgent request from Deity Grypherburg.'
'Repeat, all units, cease fire immediately.'
'Please acknowledge.'
'Yes, sir.'
Looks like it's stopped... for real this time.
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: And everyone's here.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Thank goodness...
attributes.name: Amiya
